name: CodeSee
description: CodeSee — Automated codebase visualization tool creating architecture maps and code review guides from source analysis.

seo.title: CodeSee — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: CodeSee: CodeSee — Automated codebase visualization tool creating architecture maps and code review guides from source analysis.

when_to_use: Auto-generate architecture map for onboarding new devs
Code review guide generation from PR diff analysis
Codebase visualization for legacy system modernization
Dependency mapping before large refactoring project

cons: Company pivoted and product wound down
Diagrams can feel noisy on big repos
review.verdict: Promising visualization idea, but the product's current status makes commitment risky—verify before adopting.
review.best_for: Teams evaluating codebase-visualization approaches as inspiration
review.not_for: Production adoption until the vendor's status and roadmap are clear
